headline: These 3 Dividend Stocks Have Made Investors Rich. They Can Do It Again.
summary: History doesn't guarantee anything in the stock market. But when a company has paid dividends through recessions, wars, pandemics, and inflationary cycles, and still raises its payout, that's a signal worth taking seriously.
